# CalmPDF

> Simple, private, browser-based PDF tools. Every tool runs entirely in the user's
> browser using JavaScript — files are never uploaded to a server. Free to use with
> no signup. Good for anyone who cares about privacy or works with sensitive documents.

## Tools

- [Compress PDF](https://calmpdf.com/compress-pdf): Reduce the file size of a PDF in the browser.
- [Merge PDF](https://calmpdf.com/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDFs into one file, in a chosen order.
- [Split PDF](https://calmpdf.com/split-pdf): Extract a page range or single page from a PDF.
- [Edit PDF](https://calmpdf.com/edit-pdf): Annotate and edit PDF pages in the browser.
- [Rotate PDF](https://calmpdf.com/rotate-pdf): Rotate pages in a PDF file.

## Compress PDF by target size

- [Compress PDF to 100KB](https://calmpdf.com/compress-pdf-to-100kb): Guide and tool for reducing a PDF to under 100 kilobytes.
- [Compress PDF to 500KB](https://calmpdf.com/compress-pdf-to-500kb): Guide and tool for reducing a PDF to under 500 kilobytes.
- [Compress PDF to 1MB](https://calmpdf.com/compress-pdf-to-1mb): Guide and tool for reducing a PDF to under 1 megabyte.
- [Compress PDF for Email](https://calmpdf.com/compress-pdf-for-email): How big a PDF needs to be for Gmail, Outlook, and other email providers, plus how to compress it in your browser.

## How-to guides

- [How to Compress a PDF on Mac](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/compress-pdf-on-mac): Using Preview, Quartz filters, and browser-based tools on macOS.
- [How to Compress a PDF on Windows](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/compress-pdf-on-windows): Three methods using Word, Microsoft Print to PDF, and a private browser-based tool.
- [How to Compress a PDF Without Losing Quality](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/compress-pdf-without-losing-quality): Lossless vs lossy compression and how to preserve visual fidelity.
- [How to Merge PDF Files Free](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/merge-pdf-files-free): Compare free tools for combining PDFs including CalmPDF, Smallpdf, and Preview.
- [How to Split a PDF into Multiple Files](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/split-pdf-into-multiple-files): Extract pages or page ranges from a PDF without losing quality.
- [How to Reduce PDF File Size](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/reduce-pdf-file-size): Four methods for making PDFs smaller, from reexporting to browser-based compression.
- [How to Combine PDF Files](https://calmpdf.com/how-to/combine-pdf-files): Step-by-step guide for merging PDFs on any platform.

## About

- [About CalmPDF](https://calmpdf.com/about)
- [Privacy](https://calmpdf.com/privacy)
